description: Perform a viral risk analysis in OrientDB by linking support tickets to users and identifying friends of dissatisfied customers in the 'demodb' database. Link 'Profiles' to 'Tickets' using a new edge class named 'FiledTicket' where the email addresses match. Identify profiles associated with 'High' severity tickets and mark all their directly connected friends (via 'HasFriend' edges) with a boolean property 'ChurnRisk' set to true. Export the list of emails for these at-risk friends as a JSON array to ~/at_risk_users.json.
